1717:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());

1719:

1721:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
1722:   if (options?.workspaceId) {
1723:     whereClause += ' AND workspace_id = ?';
1724:     values.push(options.workspaceId);
1725:   }
1726: 
1727:   await db
1728:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_tasks SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
1729:     .bind(...values)

1745:            error_code = NULL,

1747:            updated_at = ?
1748:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
1749:     )

119:   const alphabet = 'REDACTED/';
120:   let output = '';
121:   for (let index = 0; index < bytes.length; index += 3) {
122:     const a = bytes[index] ?? 0;
123:     const b = bytes[index + 1] ?? 0;

126:     output += alphabet[(value >> 18) & 63] ?? '';
127:     output += alphabet[(value >> 12) & 63] ?? '';
128:     output += index + 1 < bytes.length ? alphabet[(value >> 6) & 63] ?? '' : '=';

516:   async createDeployment(input: WorkspaceDeployCreateInput): Promise<WorkspaceDeployCreateResult> {
517:     if (!isValidRelativeOutputDir(input.outputDir)) {
518:       throw new ProviderError(
519:         'provider_invalid_output_dir',
520:         'deploy.outputDir must be a safe non-root relative directory path'
521:       );
522:     }
523: 
524:     const outputFiles = Array.isArray(input.outputFiles) ? input.outputFiles : [];
525:     if (outputFiles.length === 0) {
526:       throw new ProviderError('provider_invalid_output_dir', 'deploy.outputDir did not produce any publishable output files');
527:     }
528: 
529:     const manifest: Record<string, { hash: string; size: number }> = {};
530:     const payloadByHash = new Map<string, string>();
531:     for (const file of outputFiles) {
532:       const normalizedPath = file.path.replace(/\\+/g, '/').replace(/^\/+/, '').trim();
533:       if (!normalizedPath || normalizedPath.startsWith('../') || normalizedPath.includes('/../')) {
534:         throw new ProviderError('provider_invalid_output_dir', `Invalid output file path: ${file.path}`);
535:       }
536:       const manifestPath = `/${normalizedPath}`;
537:       const hash = CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.toManifestHash(file.sha256);
538:       manifest[manifestPath] = {
539:         hash,
540:         size: file.bytes.byteLength,
541:       };
542:       if (!payloadByHash.has(hash)) {
543:         payloadByHash.set(hash, toBase64(file.bytes));
544:       }
545:     }

547:     const probePath = manifestPaths.includes('/index.html') ? '/' : manifestPaths[0] ?? '/';
548: 
549:     const sessionResponse = await this.request(
550:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/assets-upload-session`,
551:       {
552:         method: 'POST',
553:         body: JSON.stringify({
554:           manifest,
555:         }),
556:       }
557:     );
558:     const sessionParsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(sessionResponse);
559:     const sessionResult =
560:       typeof sessionParsed.result === 'object' && sessionParsed.result !== null
561:         ? (sessionParsed.result as Record<string, unknown>)
562:         : {};
563:     const uploadJwt =
564:       typeof sessionResult.jwt === 'string' && sessionResult.jwt.trim() ? sessionResult.jwt.trim() : null;
565:     if (!uploadJwt) {
566:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Cloudflare asset upload session did not return a JWT');
567:     }
568: 
569:     const bucketSets = Array.isArray(sessionResult.buckets) ? sessionResult.buckets : [];
570:     let completionJwt = CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.completionJwtFromUploadResponse(sessionParsed);
571:     for (const bucket of bucketSets) {
572:       if (!Array.isArray(bucket)) {
573:         continue;
574:       }
575:       const uploadForm = new FormData();
576:       let hasUploadContent = false;
577:       for (const value of bucket) {
578:         if (typeof value !== 'string') {
579:           continue;
580:         }
581:         const normalizedHash = value.trim();
582:         const payload = payloadByHash.get(normalizedHash);
583:         if (!payload) {
584:           continue;
585:         }
586:         uploadForm.append(normalizedHash, payload);
587:         hasUploadContent = true;
588:       }
589:       if (!hasUploadContent) {
590:         continue;
591:       }
592:       const uploadResponse = await this.request(
593:         `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/assets/upload?base64=true`,
594:         {
595:           method: 'POST',
596:           body: uploadForm,
597:         },
598:         uploadJwt
599:       );
600:       const uploadParsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(uploadResponse);
601:       completionJwt = CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.completionJwtFromUploadResponse(uploadParsed) ?? completionJwt;
602:     }
603: 
604:     if (!completionJwt) {
605:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Cloudflare asset upload did not return a completion JWT');
606:     }
607: 
608:     let providerDeploymentId: string;
609:     let fallbackScriptUpdate = false;
610:     try {
611:       const alias = this.previewAliasForDeployment(input.deploymentId);
612:       const versionId = await this.createVersionWithAssetsJwt(completionJwt, alias);
613:       const deploymentId = await this.createDeploymentForVersion(versionId);
614:       providerDeploymentId = CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.providerDeploymentHandle(
615:         deploymentId,
616:         input.deploymentId,
617:         probePath
618:       );
619:     } catch (error) {
620:       const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
621:       if (
622:         providerError.code === 'provider_deploy_failed' &&
623:         providerError.message.toLowerCase().includes('invalid for field "versions"')
624:       ) {
625:         await this.deployScriptWithAssetsJwt(completionJwt);
626:         fallbackScriptUpdate = true;
627:         providerDeploymentId = CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.scriptUpdateProviderDeploymentId(input.deploymentId);
628:       } else {
629:         throw error;
630:       }
631:     }
632: 
633:     return {
634:       providerDeploymentId,
635:       status: 'running',
636:       deployedUrl: null,
637:     };
638:   }

640:   async getDeploymentStatus(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult> {
641:     const scriptUpdateDeploymentId = CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.deploymentIdFromScriptUpdateProviderId(providerDeploymentId);
642:     if (scriptUpdateDeploymentId) {
643:       const url = this.previewUrlForDeployment(scriptUpdateDeploymentId);
644:       const probe = await this.probePreviewUrl(url);
645:       if (probe === 'reachable') {
646:         return {
647:           status: 'succeeded',

651:       if (probe === 'missing') {
652:         return {
653:           status: 'failed',

655:           errorCode: 'provider_deploy_failed',
656:           errorMessage: 'Fallback script update succeeded but preview URL alias is not reachable',
657:         };
658:       }
659:       return {
660:         status: 'running',

662:       };
663:     }
664:     if (providerDeploymentId.startsWith('script_update_')) {

668:         errorCode: 'provider_deploy_failed',

670:       };

672: 
673:     const deploymentHandle = CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.parseProviderDeploymentHandle(providerDeploymentId);
674:     const providerDeploymentApiId = deploymentHandle?.providerDeploymentId ?? providerDeploymentId;

684:       return {
685:         status: 'running',
686:         deployedUrl: null,
687:       };
688:     }
689: 
690:     const parsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
691:     const result =
692:       typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null ? (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
693:     const errorCode = typeof result.error_code === 'string' ? result.error_code : undefined;
694:     const errorMessage = typeof result.error_message === 'string' ? result.error_message : undefined;

700:     if (state === 'failed' || state === 'cancelled') {
701:       return {
702:         status: state,
703:         deployedUrl: null,
704:         errorCode,
705:         errorMessage,
706:       };
707:     }
708: 
709:     const urlFromProvider =
710:       typeof result.preview_url === 'string' && result.preview_url.trim() ? result.preview_url.trim() : null;
711:     const baseUrl = urlFromProvider ?? (nimbusDeploymentId ? this.previewUrlForDeployment(nimbusDeploymentId) : null);
712:     const candidateUrl = baseUrl ? this.buildProbeUrl(baseUrl, probePath) : null;
713:     if (!candidateUrl) {
714:       if (state === 'succeeded') {
715:         if (isLegacyDeploymentId) {
716:           return {
717:             status: 'succeeded',
718:             deployedUrl: null,
719:           };
720:         }
721:         return {
722:           status: 'failed',
723:           deployedUrl: null,
724:           errorCode: 'provider_deploy_failed',
725:           errorMessage: 'Provider deployment completed but did not expose a probeable preview URL',
726:         };
727:       }
728:       return {
729:         status: 'running',
730:         deployedUrl: null,
731:       };
732:     }
733: 
734:     const probe = await this.probePreviewUrl(candidateUrl);

752:         errorCode: 'provider_probe_missing',
753:         errorMessage: 'Provider deployment completed but deployed URL alias is not yet reachable',
754:       };
755:     }
756:

765:   async cancelDeployment(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<{ accepted: boolean }> {
766:     const deploymentHandle = CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.parseProviderDeploymentHandle(providerDeploymentId);
767:     const providerDeploymentApiId = deploymentHandle?.providerDeploymentId ?? providerDeploymentId;
768:     if (CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.deploymentIdFromScriptUpdateProviderId(providerDeploymentId)) {
769:       return { accepted: false };
770:     }
771:     if (providerDeploymentId.startsWith('script_update_')) {
772:       return { accepted: false };
773:     }
774: 
775:     const response = await this.request(
776:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments/${providerDeploymentApiId}/cancel`,
777:       { method: 'POST', body: '{}' }
778:     );
779: 
780:     if (response.status === 404 || response.status === 409) {

789: export function getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(input: unknown, env: Env): WorkspaceDeployProviderName {
790:   if (typeof input === 'string' && input.trim()) {
791:     const normalizedInput = input.trim();
792:     if (normalizedInput === 'simulated' || normalizedInput === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
793:       return normalizedInput;
794:     }
795:   }
796: 
797:   const configured = typeof env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER === 'string' ? env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER.trim() : '';
798:   if (configured === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
799:     return 'cloudflare_workers_assets';
800:   }
801: 
802:   return 'simulated';
803: }
804: 
805: export function getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env: Env): string | null {
806:   const configured = typeof env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER === 'string' ? env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER.trim() : '';
807:   if (!configured || configured === 'simulated' || configured === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
808:     return null;
809:   }
810:   return `Invalid WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER value: ${configured}. Use simulated or cloudflare_workers_assets.`;
811: }
812: 
813: export function createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName: WorkspaceDeployProviderName, env: Env): WorkspaceDeployProvider {
814:   if (providerName === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
815:     return new CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider(env);
816:   }
817:   return new SimulatedWorkspaceDeployProvider(env);
818: }
819: 
820: export function normalizeProviderError(error: unknown): { code: string; message: string } {
821:   if (error instanceof ProviderError) {
822:     return { code: error.code, message: error.message };
823:   }
824: 
825:   if (error instanceof Error) {
826:     return { code: 'provider_deploy_failed', message: error.message };
827:   }
828: 
829:   return { code: 'provider_deploy_failed', message: String(error) };
830: }

118: function parseInteger(value: unknown, fallback: number, min: number, max: number): number {
119:   if (typeof value !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(value)) {
120:     return fallback;
121:   }
122:   const normalized = Math.floor(value);
123:   if (normalized < min) {
124:     return min;
125:   }
126:   if (normalized > max) {
127:     return max;
128:   }
129:   return normalized;
130: }
131: 
132: function parseString(value: unknown): string | null {
133:   if (typeof value !== 'string') {
134:     return null;
135:   }
136:   const trimmed = value.trim();
137:   return trimmed.length > 0 ? trimmed : null;
138: }
139: 
140: function parseIntegerString(value: string | undefined, fallback: number, min: number, max: number): number {
141:   if (typeof value !== 'string') {
142:     return fallback;
143:   }
144:   const parsed = Number.parseInt(value.trim(), 10);
145:   if (!Number.isFinite(parsed)) {
146:     return fallback;
147:   }
148:   return parseInteger(parsed, fallback, min, max);
149: }

151: function isRetryableProviderError(code: string, message: string): boolean {
152:   if (code === 'provider_rate_limited') {
153:     return true;
154:   }
155:   return /(temporarily unavailable|timeout|timed out|network|connection reset|fetch failed)/i.test(message);
156: }
157: 
158: function isTransientFailure(error: unknown): boolean {
159:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
160:   return /(timeout|timed out|temporar|network|fetch failed|connection reset|sandbox unavailable|rate limit|database is locked|sqlite_busy)/i.test(
161:     message
162:   );
163: }

165: function toHex(bytes: Uint8Array): string {
166:   let result = '';
167:   for (const byte of bytes) {
168:     result += byte.toString(16).padStart(2, '0');
169:   }
170:   return result;
171: }

173: async function sha256Hex(input: BufferSource): Promise<string> {
174:   const digest = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', input);
175:   return toHex(new Uint8Array(digest));
176: }

178: async function sha256HexText(input: string): Promise<string> {
179:   return sha256Hex(new TextEncoder().encode(input));
180: }

186: function managerRunScriptCommand(profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile, scriptName: 'test' | 'build'): string {
187:   if (profile.manager === 'pnpm') {
188:     return `pnpm run -s ${scriptName}`;
189:   }
190:   if (profile.manager === 'yarn') {
191:     return `yarn -s ${scriptName}`;
192:   }
193:   return `npm run -s ${scriptName}`;
194: }

196: function managerInstallCommand(
197:   profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile,
198:   options?: { preferNpmCi?: boolean; ignoreScripts?: boolean }
199: ): string {
200:   const ignoreScripts = options?.ignoreScripts !== false;
201:   const ignoreScriptsArg = ignoreScripts ? ' --ignore-scripts' : '';
202:   if (profile.manager === 'pnpm') {
203:     return `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile${ignoreScriptsArg}`;
204:   }
205:   if (profile.manager === 'yarn') {
206:     const major = profile.version ? Number.parseInt(profile.version.split('.')[0] ?? '', 10) : NaN;
207:     if (Number.isFinite(major) && major <= 1) {
208:       return `yarn install --frozen-lockfile${ignoreScriptsArg}`;
209:     }
210:     return ignoreScripts ? 'YARN_ENABLE_SCRIPTS=false yarn install --immutable' : 'yarn install --immutable';
211:   }
212:   if (options?.preferNpmCi === false) {
213:     return `npm install --include=dev${ignoreScriptsArg} --no-audit --no-fund`;
214:   }
215:   return `npm ci --include=dev${ignoreScriptsArg} --no-audit --no-fund`;
216: }

218: function managerBinary(profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile): string {
219:   if (profile.manager === 'pnpm' || profile.manager === 'yarn' || profile.manager === 'npm') {
220:     return profile.manager;
221:   }
222:   return 'npm';
223: }

225: async function bootstrapToolchainIfNeeded(
226:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
227:   profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile
228: ): Promise<void> {
229:   if (profile.manager !== 'pnpm' && profile.manager !== 'yarn') {
230:     return;
231:   }
232: 
233:   const corepackVersion = await sandbox.exec('corepack --version');
234:   if (corepackVersion.exitCode !== 0) {
235:     throw new PolicyError('corepack_missing', 'corepack is required for pnpm/yarn but is not available in sandbox runtime');
236:   }
237: 
238:   const enable = await sandbox.exec('corepack enable');
239:   if (enable.exitCode !== 0) {
240:     const combined = [enable.stdout, enable.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
241:     throw new PolicyError('package_manager_bootstrap_failed', combined || 'corepack enable failed');
242:   }
243: 
244:   if (profile.version) {
245:     const prepare = await sandbox.exec(`corepack prepare ${profile.manager}@${profile.version} --activate`);
246:     if (prepare.exitCode !== 0) {
247:       const combined = [prepare.stdout, prepare.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
248:       throw new PolicyError('package_manager_bootstrap_failed', combined || 'corepack prepare failed');
249:     }
250:   }
251: }

253: async function makeDependencyCacheKey(workspaceId: string, profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile): Promise<string | null> {
254:   if (!profile.lockfile?.sha256) {
255:     return null;
256:   }
257:   const source = [workspaceId, profile.projectRoot, profile.manager, profile.version ?? 'latest', profile.lockfile.sha256].join(':');
258:   return sha256HexText(source);
259: }

261: function fromBase64(input: string): Uint8Array {
262:   const normalized = input.replace(/\s+/g, '');
263:   if (typeof globalThis.atob === 'function') {
264:     const binary = globalThis.atob(normalized);
265:     const bytes = new Uint8Array(binary.length);
266:     for (let index = 0; index < binary.length; index += 1) {
267:       bytes[index] = binary.charCodeAt(index);
268:     }
269:     return bytes;
270:   }
271: 
272:   if (typeof Buffer !== 'undefined') {
273:     return new Uint8Array(Buffer.from(normalized, 'base64'));
274:   }
275: 
276:   throw new Error('No base64 decoder is available in this runtime');
277: }
278: 
279: function toBase64(input: Uint8Array): string {
280:   if (typeof Buffer !== 'undefined') {
281:     return Buffer.from(input).toString('base64');
282:   }
283:   let binary = '';
284:   for (let index = 0; index < input.length; index += 1) {
285:     binary += String.fromCharCode(input[index]);
286:   }
287:   if (typeof globalThis.btoa === 'function') {
288:     return globalThis.btoa(binary);
289:   }
290:   throw new Error('No base64 encoder is available in this runtime');
291: }

306: async function runSandboxCommand(
307:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
308:   command: string,
309:   options?: { timeout?: number }
310: ): Promise<string> {
311:   const result = await sandbox.exec(command, options);
312:   if (result.exitCode !== 0) {
313:     const output = [result.stdout, result.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
314:     throw new Error(`Sandbox command failed with exit ${result.exitCode}: ${output || 'No output'}`);
315:   }
316:   return result.stdout;
317: }

335: async function detectPackageScriptsInProjectRoot(
336:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
337:   projectRoot: string
338: ): Promise<{ hasBuild: boolean; hasTest: boolean }> {
339:   const normalizedRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(projectRoot);
340:   const output = await runSandboxCommand(
341:     sandbox,
342:     `cd ${shellQuote(
343:       WORKSPACE_ROOT
344:     )} && python3 - <<'PY'\n# nimbus_detect_scripts\nimport json\nimport os\n\nproject_root = ${JSON.stringify(normalizedRoot)}\npath = os.path.join(project_root, 'package.json') if project_root != '.' else 'package.json'\nif not os.path.exists(path):\n    print(json.dumps({'hasBuild': False, 'hasTest': False}))\n    raise SystemExit(0)\ntry:\n    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        payload = json.load(f)\nexcept Exception:\n    print(json.dumps({'hasBuild': False, 'hasTest': False}))\n    raise SystemExit(0)\nscripts = payload.get('scripts', {}) if isinstance(payload, dict) else {}\nprint(json.dumps({'hasBuild': bool(isinstance(scripts, dict) and scripts.get('build')), 'hasTest': bool(isinstance(scripts, dict) and scripts.get('test'))}))\nPY`
345:   );
346:   const parsed = JSON.parse(output) as { hasBuild?: boolean; hasTest?: boolean };
347:   return {
348:     hasBuild: Boolean(parsed.hasBuild),
349:     hasTest: Boolean(parsed.hasTest),
350:   };
351: }

353: function parseValidationToolMissing(output: string): { tool: string; raw: string } | null {
354:   const normalized = output.toLowerCase();
355:   const knownTools = ['pnpm', 'npm', 'yarn', 'bun'];
356:   for (const tool of knownTools) {
357:     if (normalized.includes(`${tool}: not found`) || normalized.includes(`${tool}: command not found`)) {
358:       return { tool, raw: output };
359:     }
360:   }
361:   const missingToolMatch = output.match(/(?:^|\s)([A-Za-z0-9._-]+):\s*(?:not found|command not found)/m);
362:   if (missingToolMatch?.[1]) {
363:     return { tool: missingToolMatch[1], raw: output };
364:   }
365:   if (normalized.includes('command not found')) {
366:     return { tool: 'unknown', raw: output };
367:   }
368:   return null;
369: }
370: 
371: async function runValidationStep(
372:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
373:   command: string,
374:   timeout: number,
375:   missingToolCode: string,
376:   options?: { allowProjectToolMissing?: boolean }
377: ): Promise<void> {
378:   const result = await sandbox.exec(command, { timeout });
379:   if (result.exitCode === 0) {
380:     return;
381:   }
382: 
383:   const output = [result.stdout, result.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
384:   const missingTool = parseValidationToolMissing(output);
385:   if (missingTool) {
386:     const runtimeTools = new Set(['pnpm', 'npm', 'yarn', 'bun', 'node', 'nodejs', 'corepack']);
387:     const isRuntimeTool = runtimeTools.has(missingTool.tool.toLowerCase());
388:     const allowProjectToolMissing = options?.allowProjectToolMissing === true;
389:     if (!isRuntimeTool && !allowProjectToolMissing) {
390:       throw new PolicyError(
391:         'validation_command_failed',
392:         `Validation command failed with exit ${result.exitCode}: ${output || 'No output'}`
393:       );
394:     }
395:     throw new PolicyError(
396:       missingToolCode,
397:       `Validation tool is missing in sandbox runtime (${missingTool.tool}); disable this validation step or install the tool`
398:     );
399:   }
400: 
401:   throw new PolicyError(
402:     'validation_command_failed',
403:     `Validation command failed with exit ${result.exitCode}: ${output || 'No output'}`
404:   );
405: }
406: 
407: async function installDependenciesForValidation(
408:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
409:   profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile,
410:   workspaceProjectRoot: string,
411:   options: {
412:     ignoreScripts: boolean;
413:     allowNpmFallback: boolean;
414:     installFromWorkspaceRoot: boolean;
415:     installProjectRoot: string;
416:   }
417: ): Promise<void> {
418:   const installRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(options.installProjectRoot);
419:   const projectDir = options.installFromWorkspaceRoot
420:     ? WORKSPACE_ROOT
421:     : installRoot === '.'
422:       ? WORKSPACE_ROOT
423:       : `${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/${installRoot}`;
424:   try {
425:     await runValidationStep(
426:       sandbox,
427:       `cd ${shellQuote(projectDir)} && ${managerInstallCommand(profile, {
428:         preferNpmCi: true,
429:         ignoreScripts: options.ignoreScripts,
430:       })}`,
431:       10 * 60 * 1000,
432:       'validation_tool_missing'
433:     );
434:   } catch (error) {
435:     if (
436:       error instanceof PolicyError &&
437:       error.code === 'validation_command_failed' &&
438:       profile.manager === 'npm' &&
439:       options.allowNpmFallback &&
440:       /npm ci|eusage|package\.json.*package-lock\.json.*sync|clean install a project/i.test(error.message)
441:     ) {
442:       await runValidationStep(
443:         sandbox,
444:         `cd ${shellQuote(projectDir)} && ${managerInstallCommand(profile, {
445:           preferNpmCi: false,
446:           ignoreScripts: options.ignoreScripts,
447:         })}`,
448:         10 * 60 * 1000,
449:         'validation_tool_missing'
450:       );
451:       return;
452:     }
453:     if (error instanceof PolicyError && error.code === 'validation_command_failed') {
454:       throw new PolicyError('dependency_install_failed', error.message);
455:     }
456:     throw error;
457:   }
458: }

460: async function shouldInstallFromWorkspaceRoot(
461:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
462:   profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile,
463:   workspaceProjectRoot: string
464: ): Promise<boolean> {
465:   if (profile.manager !== 'npm' || workspaceProjectRoot === '.') {
466:     return false;
467:   }
468: 
469:   const output = await runSandboxCommand(
470:     sandbox,
471:     `cd ${shellQuote(
472:       WORKSPACE_ROOT
473:     )} && python3 - <<'PY'\n# nimbus_detect_workspace_membership\nimport fnmatch\nimport json\nimport os\n\nproject_root = ${JSON.stringify(workspaceProjectRoot)}\nif not os.path.exists('package.json') or not os.path.exists('package-lock.json'):\n    print('project')\n    raise SystemExit(0)\n\ntry:\n    with open('package.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        payload = json.load(f)\nexcept Exception:\n    print('project')\n    raise SystemExit(0)\n\nworkspaces = []\nif isinstance(payload, dict):\n    raw = payload.get('workspaces')\n    if isinstance(raw, list):\n        workspaces = [item for item in raw if isinstance(item, str)]\n    elif isinstance(raw, dict):\n        packages = raw.get('packages')\n        if isinstance(packages, list):\n            workspaces = [item for item in packages if isinstance(item, str)]\n\nif not workspaces:\n    print('project')\n    raise SystemExit(0)\n\nroot = project_root.replace('\\\\', '/').strip('./')\nif not root:\n    print('project')\n    raise SystemExit(0)\nfor pattern in workspaces:\n    normalized = pattern.replace('\\\\', '/').rstrip('/')\n    if not normalized:\n        continue\n    direct = normalized == root\n    wildcard = fnmatch.fnmatch(root, normalized)\n    nested = fnmatch.fnmatch(root + '/placeholder', normalized.rstrip('/') + '/*')\n    if direct or wildcard or nested:\n        print('workspace')\n        raise SystemExit(0)\n\nprint('project')\nPY`
474:   );
475:   return output.trim() === 'workspace';
476: }

478: async function cleanupValidationInstallArtifacts(
479:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
480:   workspaceProjectRoot: string,
481:   installFromWorkspaceRoot: boolean,
482:   installProjectRoot: string
483: ): Promise<void> {
484:   const projectDir = workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? WORKSPACE_ROOT : `${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/${workspaceProjectRoot}`;
485:   const installDir = installProjectRoot === '.' ? WORKSPACE_ROOT : `${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/${installProjectRoot}`;
486:   const targets: string[] = [];
487:   if (installFromWorkspaceRoot || workspaceProjectRoot === '.') {
488:     targets.push(`${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/node_modules`);
489:   }
490:   targets.push(`${projectDir}/node_modules`);
491:   targets.push(`${installDir}/node_modules`);
492:   const uniqueTargets = Array.from(new Set(targets));
493:   if (uniqueTargets.length === 0) {
494:     return;
495:   }
496:   await sandbox.exec(`rm -rf ${uniqueTargets.map((path) => shellQuote(path)).join(' ')}`, { timeout: 5 * 60 * 1000 });
497: }

499: function validationScriptCommand(
500:   toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile,
501:   scriptName: 'test' | 'build',
502:   workspaceProjectRoot: string,
503:   installFromWorkspaceRoot: boolean
504: ): string {
505:   if (toolchain.manager === 'npm' && installFromWorkspaceRoot && workspaceProjectRoot !== '.') {
506:     return `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && npm run -s ${scriptName} -w ${shellQuote(workspaceProjectRoot)}`;
507:   }
508:   return `cd ${shellQuote(
509:     workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? WORKSPACE_ROOT : `${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/${workspaceProjectRoot}`
510:   )} && ${managerRunScriptCommand(toolchain, scriptName)}`;

513: async function detectPotentialSecrets(sandbox: SandboxClient): Promise<string[]> {
514:   const output = await runSandboxCommand(
515:     sandbox,
516:     `cd ${shellQuote(
517:       WORKSPACE_ROOT
518:     )} && python3 - <<'PY'\n# nimbus_detect_secrets\nimport json\nimport os\nimport re\n\npattern = re.compile(r'(^|/)(\\.env(\\.|$)|id_rsa|id_dsa|.*\\.pem$|.*\\.p12$|.*\\.key$)', re.IGNORECASE)\nallowed_env_templates = re.compile(r'(^|/)\\.env\\.(example|sample|template|dist|defaults)(\\.|$)', re.IGNORECASE)\nexcluded_dirs = {'.git', 'node_modules', '.next', '.nuxt', '.svelte-kit', '.turbo', '.cache', 'dist', 'build', 'coverage', 'target'}\nroot = os.getcwd()\nmatches = []\nfor dirpath, dirnames, filenames in os.walk(root):\n    rel_dir = os.path.relpath(dirpath, root)\n    if rel_dir == '.':\n        rel_dir = ''\n    if rel_dir and any(part in excluded_dirs for part in rel_dir.split(os.sep)):\n        continue\n    dirnames[:] = [d for d in dirnames if d not in excluded_dirs]\n    for name in filenames:\n        absolute = os.path.join(dirpath, name)\n        rel = os.path.relpath(absolute, root).replace('\\\\', '/')\n        if allowed_env_templates.search(rel):\n            continue\n        if pattern.search(rel):\n            matches.append(rel)\nprint(json.dumps(matches[:25]))\nPY`
519:   );
520: 
521:   const parsed = JSON.parse(output) as unknown;
522:   if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) {
523:     return [];
524:   }
525: 
526:   return parsed.filter((item): item is string => typeof item === 'string').slice(0, 25);
527: }

529: async function createDeploymentBundle(
530:   sandbox: SandboxClient
531: ): Promise<{ bytes: Uint8Array; sha256: string; objectKeySuffix: string }> {
532:   const base64 = await runSandboxCommand(
533:     sandbox,
534:     `cd ${shellQuote(
535:       WORKSPACE_ROOT
536:     )} && tmp_stem=$(mktemp /tmp/nimbus-workspace-deploy.XXXXXX) && tmp_bundle="\${tmp_stem}.tar.gz" && tar -czf "$tmp_bundle" --exclude='.git' . && base64 "$tmp_bundle" && rm -f "$tmp_bundle" "$tmp_stem"`,
537:     { timeout: 8 * 60 * 1000 }
538:   );
539:   const bytes = fromBase64(base64);
540:   const sha = await sha256Hex(bytes);
541:   return {
542:     bytes,
543:     sha256: sha,
544:     objectKeySuffix: 'source.tar.gz',
545:   };
546: }

548: async function createOutputBundle(
549:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
550:   outputDir: string
551: ): Promise<{ bytes: Uint8Array; sha256: string; objectKeySuffix: string }> {
552:   const normalizedOutputDir = normalizeProjectRoot(outputDir);
553:   const base64 = await runSandboxCommand(
554:     sandbox,
555:     `cd ${shellQuote(
556:       WORKSPACE_ROOT
557:     )} && if [ ! -d ${shellQuote(
558:       normalizedOutputDir
559:     )} ]; then echo '__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_MISSING__'; else tmp_stem=$(mktemp /tmp/nimbus-workspace-output.XXXXXX) && tmp_bundle="\${tmp_stem}.tar.gz" && tar -czf "$tmp_bundle" -C ${shellQuote(
560:       normalizedOutputDir
561:     )} . && base64 "$tmp_bundle" && rm -f "$tmp_bundle" "$tmp_stem"; fi`,
562:     { timeout: 8 * 60 * 1000 }
563:   );
564: 
565:   if (base64.trim() === '__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_MISSING__') {
566:     throw new PolicyError('provider_invalid_output_dir', `deploy.outputDir directory does not exist: ${normalizedOutputDir}`);
567:   }
568: 
569:   const bytes = fromBase64(base64);
570:   const sha = await sha256Hex(bytes);
571:   return {
572:     bytes,
573:     sha256: sha,
574:     objectKeySuffix: 'output.tar.gz',
575:   };
576: }

578: async function createOutputFiles(
579:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
580:   outputDir: string
581: ): Promise<Array<{ path: string; bytes: Uint8Array; sha256: string }>> {
582:   const normalizedOutputDir = normalizeProjectRoot(outputDir);
583:   const output = await runSandboxCommand(
584:     sandbox,
585:     `cd ${shellQuote(
586:       WORKSPACE_ROOT
587:     )} && python3 - <<'PY'\n# nimbus_collect_output_files\nimport hashlib\nimport json\nimport os\n\nroot = ${JSON.stringify(normalizedOutputDir)}\nif not os.path.isdir(root):\n    print('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_MISSING__')\n    raise SystemExit(0)\nroot_real = os.path.realpath(root)\nfiles = []\nfor dirpath, dirnames, filenames in os.walk(root):\n    dirnames.sort()\n    for dirname in list(dirnames):\n        directory_absolute = os.path.join(dirpath, dirname)\n        directory_rel = os.path.relpath(directory_absolute, root).replace('\\\\', '/')\n        if os.path.islink(directory_absolute):\n            print('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_SYMLINK__:' + directory_rel + '/')\n            raise SystemExit(0)\n    filenames.sort()\n    for filename in filenames:\n        absolute = os.path.join(dirpath, filename)\n        rel = os.path.relpath(absolute, root).replace('\\\\', '/')\n        if os.path.islink(absolute):\n            print('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_SYMLINK__:' + rel)\n            raise SystemExit(0)\n        resolved = os.path.realpath(absolute)\n        if not (resolved == root_real or resolved.startswith(root_real + os.sep)):\n            print('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_ESCAPE__:' + rel)\n            raise SystemExit(0)\n        hasher = hashlib.sha256()\n        size = 0\n        with open(absolute, 'rb') as f:\n            while True:\n                chunk = f.read(1024 * 1024)\n                if not chunk:\n                    break\n                size += len(chunk)\n                hasher.update(chunk)\n        files.append({\n            'path': rel,\n            'size': size,\n            'sha256': hasher.hexdigest(),\n        })\nfiles.sort(key=lambda item: item['path'])\nprint(json.dumps({'files': files}))\nPY`,
588:     { timeout: 8 * 60 * 1000 }
589:   );
590: 
591:   if (output.trim() === '__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_MISSING__') {
592:     throw new PolicyError('provider_invalid_output_dir', `deploy.outputDir directory does not exist: ${normalizedOutputDir}`);
593:   }
594:   if (output.trim().startsWith('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_SYMLINK__:')) {
595:     const path = output.trim().slice('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_SYMLINK__:'.length).trim() || 'unknown';
596:     throw new PolicyError('provider_invalid_output_dir', `deploy.outputDir contains a symlinked entry: ${path}`);
597:   }
598:   if (output.trim().startsWith('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_ESCAPE__:')) {
599:     const path = output.trim().slice('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_ESCAPE__:'.length).trim() || 'unknown';
600:     throw new PolicyError('provider_invalid_output_dir', `deploy.outputDir contains a file resolving outside output root: ${path}`);
601:   }
602: 
603:   const parsed = JSON.parse(output) as { files?: Array<{ path?: string; base64?: string; sha256?: string; size?: number }> };
604:   const files = Array.isArray(parsed.files) ? parsed.files : [];
605:   if (files.length === 0) {
606:     throw new PolicyError('provider_invalid_output_dir', `deploy.outputDir directory does not contain any files: ${normalizedOutputDir}`);
607:   }
608: 
609:   const readFileBase64 = async (relativePath: string): Promise<string> => {
610:     const payload = await runSandboxCommand(
611:       sandbox,
612:       `cd ${shellQuote(
613:         WORKSPACE_ROOT
614:       )} && python3 - <<'PY'\n# nimbus_collect_output_file_bytes\nimport base64\nimport os\n\nroot = ${JSON.stringify(normalizedOutputDir)}\nrel = ${JSON.stringify(relativePath)}\nabsolute = os.path.join(root, rel)\nroot_real = os.path.realpath(root)\nif not os.path.isfile(absolute):\n    print('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_FILE_MISSING__')\n    raise SystemExit(0)\nif os.path.islink(absolute):\n    print('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_SYMLINK__:' + rel)\n    raise SystemExit(0)\nresolved = os.path.realpath(absolute)\nif not (resolved == root_real or resolved.startswith(root_real + os.sep)):\n    print('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_ESCAPE__:' + rel)\n    raise SystemExit(0)\nwith open(absolute, 'rb') as f:\n    payload = f.read()\nprint(base64.b64encode(payload).decode('ascii'))\nPY`,
615:       { timeout: 8 * 60 * 1000 }
616:     );
617:     const trimmed = payload.trim();
618:     if (trimmed === '__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_FILE_MISSING__') {
619:       throw new PolicyError('provider_invalid_output_dir', `deploy.outputDir file disappeared during publish: ${relativePath}`);
620:     }
621:     if (trimmed.startsWith('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_SYMLINK__:')) {
622:       const path = trimmed.slice('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_SYMLINK__:'.length).trim() || relativePath;
623:       throw new PolicyError('provider_invalid_output_dir', `deploy.outputDir contains a symlinked entry: ${path}`);
624:     }
625:     if (trimmed.startsWith('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_ESCAPE__:')) {
626:       const path = trimmed.slice('__NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR_ESCAPE__:'.length).trim() || relativePath;
627:       throw new PolicyError('provider_invalid_output_dir', `deploy.outputDir contains a file resolving outside output root: ${path}`);
628:     }
629:     return trimmed;
630:   };
631: 
632:   const resolvedFiles: Array<{ path: string; bytes: Uint8Array; sha256: string }> = [];
633:   for (const file of files) {
634:       const path = typeof file.path === 'string' ? file.path : '';
635:       const sha256 = typeof file.sha256 === 'string' ? file.sha256 : '';
636:       const inlineBase64 = typeof file.base64 === 'string' ? file.base64 : '';
637:       if (!path || !sha256) {
638:         throw new PolicyError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Output file collection returned invalid metadata');
639:       }
640:       const fileBase64 = inlineBase64 || (await readFileBase64(path));
641:       resolvedFiles.push({
642:         path,
643:         bytes: fromBase64(fileBase64),
644:         sha256,
645:       });
646:   }
647: 
648:   return resolvedFiles.sort((a, b) => a.path.localeCompare(b.path));
649: }
650: 
651: async function createSyntheticOutputBundleFromFiles(
652:   files: Array<{ path: string; sha256: string }>
653: ): Promise<{ bytes: Uint8Array; sha256: string; objectKeySuffix: string }> {
654:   const manifest = files
655:     .slice()
656:     .sort((a, b) => a.path.localeCompare(b.path))
657:     .map((file) => `${file.path}\0${file.sha256}`)
658:     .join('\n');
659:   const bytes = new Uint8Array();
660:   const manifestSha = await sha256Hex(new TextEncoder().encode(manifest));
661:   return {
662:     bytes,
663:     sha256: manifestSha,
664:     objectKeySuffix: 'output.synthetic',
665:   };
666: }
667: 
668: async function createDependencyCacheArchive(
669:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
670:   profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile
671: ): Promise<{ bytes: Uint8Array; sha256: string } | null> {
672:   const projectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(profile.projectRoot);
673:   const nodeModules = projectRoot === '.' ? 'node_modules' : `${projectRoot}/node_modules`;
674:   const result = await sandbox.exec(
675:     `cd ${shellQuote(
676:       WORKSPACE_ROOT
677:     )} && if [ ! -d ${shellQuote(
678:       nodeModules
679:     )} ]; then echo '{}'; else tmp_stem=$(mktemp /tmp/nimbus-workspace-cache.XXXXXX) && tmp_bundle="${'$'}{tmp_stem}.tar.gz" && tar -czf "${'$'}tmp_bundle" ${shellQuote(
680:       nodeModules
681:     )} && base64 "${'$'}tmp_bundle" && rm -f "${'$'}tmp_bundle" "${'$'}tmp_stem"; fi`,
682:     { timeout: 5 * 60 * 1000 }
683:   );
684:   if (result.exitCode !== 0) {
685:     return null;
686:   }
687:   const output = result.stdout.trim();
688:   if (!output || output === '{}') {
689:     return null;
690:   }
691:   const bytes = fromBase64(output);
692:   return {
693:     bytes,
694:     sha256: await sha256Hex(bytes),
695:   };
696: }
697: 
698: async function restoreDependencyCacheArchive(
699:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
700:   profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile,
701:   bytes: Uint8Array
702: ): Promise<void> {
703:   const projectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(profile.projectRoot);
704:   const payload = toBase64(bytes);
705:   const tempPath = `/tmp/nimbus-cache-${Date.now()}-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 1_000_000)}.b64`;
706:   const reset = await sandbox.exec(`python3 - <<'PY'\nopen(${JSON.stringify(tempPath)}, 'wb').close()\nPY`);
707:   if (reset.exitCode !== 0) {
708:     const combined = [reset.stdout, reset.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
709:     throw new Error(combined || 'Failed to initialize dependency cache payload file');
710:   }
711: 
712:   const chunkSize = 8 * 1024;
713:   for (let offset = 0; offset < payload.length; offset += chunkSize) {
714:     const chunk = payload.slice(offset, offset + chunkSize);
715:     const append = await sandbox.exec(
716:       `python3 - <<'PY'\nwith open(${JSON.stringify(tempPath)}, 'ab') as f:\n    f.write(${JSON.stringify(chunk)}.encode('ascii'))\nPY`
717:     );
718:     if (append.exitCode !== 0) {
719:       const combined = [append.stdout, append.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
720:       throw new Error(combined || 'Failed while streaming dependency cache payload');
721:     }
722:   }
723: 
724:   const command =
725:     `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && mkdir -p ${shellQuote(projectRoot)} && python3 - <<'PY'\n` +
726:     `import base64\n` +
727:     `import pathlib\n` +
728:     `import subprocess\n` +
729:     `payload_path = pathlib.Path(${JSON.stringify(tempPath)})\n` +
730:     `raw = base64.b64decode(payload_path.read_bytes())\n` +
731:     `proc = subprocess.run(['tar', '-xzf', '-', '-C', '.'], input=raw)\n` +
732:     `payload_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)\n` +
733:     `raise SystemExit(proc.returncode)\n` +
734:     `PY`;
735:   const extract = await sandbox.exec(command, { timeout: 5 * 60 * 1000 });
736:   if (extract.exitCode !== 0) {
737:     const combined = [extract.stdout, extract.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
738:     throw new Error(combined || 'Failed to restore dependency cache archive');
739:   }
740: }

742: async function resolveRollbackContext(workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string, enabled: boolean, env: Env): Promise<unknown> {
743:   if (!enabled) {
744:     return { status: 'disabled' };
745:   }
746:   const previous = await getLatestSuccessfulWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId);
747:   if (!previous || previous.id === deploymentId) {
748:     return { status: 'no_previous_success' };
749:   }
750:   return {
751:     status: 'retained_previous',
752:     deploymentId: previous.id,
753:     deployedUrl: previous.deployedUrl,
754:     providerDeploymentId: previous.providerDeploymentId,
755:   };
756: }

758: async function resolveRollbackContextSafely(
759:   workspaceId: string,
760:   deploymentId: string,
761:   enabled: boolean,
762:   env: Env
763: ): Promise<unknown> {
764:   try {
765:     return await resolveRollbackContext(workspaceId, deploymentId, enabled, env);
766:   } catch (error) {
767:     return {
768:       status: 'lookup_failed',
769:       message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
770:     };
771:   }
772: }

774: async function reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(
775:   env: Env,
776:   workspaceId: string,
777:   deploymentId: string
778: ): Promise<void> {
779:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
780:   if (!deployment) {
781:     return;
782:   }
783: 
784:   if (deployment.status === 'succeeded') {
785:     const hasSucceededEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
786:       env.DB,
787:       workspaceId,
788:       deploymentId,
789:       'deployment_succeeded'
790:     );
791:     if (!hasSucceededEvent) {
792:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
793:         workspaceId,
794:         deploymentId,
795:         eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
796:         payload: {
797:           deployedUrl: deployment.deployedUrl,
798:           sourceBundleKey: deployment.sourceBundleKey,
799:           sourceSnapshotSha256: deployment.sourceSnapshotSha256,
800:         },
801:       });
802:     }
803: 
804:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
805:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
806:       status: 'succeeded',
807:       deployedUrl: deployment.deployedUrl,
808:       deployedAt: deployment.finishedAt,
809:       errorCode: null,
810:       errorMessage: null,
811:     });
812:     return;
813:   }
814: 
815:   if (deployment.status === 'failed') {
816:     const hasFailedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'deployment_failed');
817:     if (!hasFailedEvent) {
818:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
819:         workspaceId,
820:         deploymentId,
821:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
822:         payload: {
823:           code: deployment.error?.code ?? 'deployment_failed',
824:           message: deployment.error?.message ?? 'Deployment failed',
825:         },
826:       });
827:     }
828: 
829:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
830:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
831:       status: 'failed',
832:       errorCode: deployment.error?.code ?? null,
833:       errorMessage: deployment.error?.message ?? null,
834:     });
835:     return;
836:   }
837: 
838:   if (deployment.status === 'cancelled') {
839:     const hasCancelledEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
840:       env.DB,
841:       workspaceId,
842:       deploymentId,
843:       'deployment_cancelled'
844:     );
845:     if (!hasCancelledEvent) {
846:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
847:         workspaceId,
848:         deploymentId,
849:         eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
850:         payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
851:       });
852:     }
853: 
854:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
855:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
856:       status: 'cancelled',
857:       errorCode: null,
858:       errorMessage: null,
859:     });
860:   }
861: }

863: async function markDeploymentCancelled(
864:   env: Env,
865:   workspaceId: string,
866:   deploymentId: string,
867:   reason: string
868: ): Promise<void> {
869:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
870:   const cancelledUpdate = await env.DB
871:     .prepare(
872:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
873:        SET status = 'cancelled',
874:            result_json = ?,
875:            error_code = NULL,
876:            error_message = NULL,
877:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
878:            duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
879:            updated_at = ?
880:        WHERE id = ?
881:          AND workspace_id = ?
882:          AND status IN ('queued', 'running')`
883:     )
884:     .bind(JSON.stringify({ reason }), now, now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
885:     .run();
886: 
887:   if ((cancelledUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
888:     return;
889:   }
890: 
891:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
892:     workspaceId,
893:     deploymentId,
894:     eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
895:     payload: { reason },
896:   });
897:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
898:     deploymentId,
899:     status: 'cancelled',
900:     errorCode: null,
901:     errorMessage: null,
902:   });
903: }
904: 
905: function isRunningDeploymentStale(startedAt: string | null): boolean {
906:   if (!startedAt) {
907:     return false;
908:   }
909: 
910:   const startedAtEpochMs = Date.parse(startedAt);
911:   if (!Number.isFinite(startedAtEpochMs)) {
912:     return false;
913:   }
914: 
915:   return Date.now() - startedAtEpochMs >= STALE_RUNNING_TIMEOUT_MS;
916: }

918: async function throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
919:   const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
920:   if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
921:     throw new CancelRequestedError();
922:   }
923: }
924: 
925: async function executeWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
926:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
927:   if (!deployment) {
928:     return;
929:   }
930:   const payload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
931:   if (!payload) {
932:     throw new PolicyError('deployment_not_found', 'Deployment payload no longer exists');
933:   }
934: 
935:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
936:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
937:     throw new PolicyError('workspace_not_ready', 'Workspace is not ready for deployment');
938:   }
939: 
940:   const validation =
941:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
942:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
943:       : {};
944:   const autoFix =
945:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
946:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
947:       : {};
948:   const cache =
949:     payload.cache && typeof payload.cache === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.cache)
950:       ? (payload.cache as Record<string, unknown>)
951:       : {};
952:   const requestedToolchain =
953:     payload.toolchain && typeof payload.toolchain === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.toolchain)
954:       ? (payload.toolchain as Record<string, unknown>)
955:       : null;
956:   const deploy =
957:     payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
958:       ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
959:       : {};
960:   const validationOptions: DeploymentValidationOptions = {
961:     runBuildIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true),
962:     runTestsIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true),
963:   };
964:   const autoFixOptions: DeploymentAutoFixOptions = {
965:     rehydrateBaseline: parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false),
966:     bootstrapToolchain: parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false),
967:   };
968:   const cacheOptions: DeploymentCacheOptions = {
969:     dependencyCache: parseBoolean(cache.dependencyCache, true),
970:   };
971:   const publishOptions: DeploymentPublishOptions = {
972:     provider: getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(payload.provider, env),
973:     outputDir: parseString(deploy.outputDir),
974:   };
975:   const { runBuildIfPresent, runTestsIfPresent } = validationOptions;
976:   const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(payload.rollbackOnFailure, true);
977:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
978:   const workspaceProjectRootRaw =
979:     typeof workspace.sourceProjectRoot === 'string' && workspace.sourceProjectRoot.trim() ? workspace.sourceProjectRoot : '.';
980:   let workspaceProjectRoot = '.';
981:   try {
982:     workspaceProjectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(workspaceProjectRootRaw);
983:   } catch (error) {
984:     throw new PolicyError('invalid_project_root', error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
985:   }
986: 
987:   if (publishOptions.provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && !publishOptions.outputDir) {
988:     throw new PolicyError(
989:       'provider_invalid_output_dir',
990:       'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider'
991:     );
992:   }
993: 
994:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
995:   try {
996:     await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
997:   } catch (error) {
998:     if (!(error instanceof PolicyError) || error.code !== 'baseline_missing') {
999:       throw error;
1000:     }
1001: 
1002:     if (!autoFixOptions.rehydrateBaseline) {
1003:       throw error;
1004:     }
1005: 
1006:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1007:       workspaceId,
1008:       deploymentId,
1009:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_attempted',
1010:       payload: {},
1011:     });
1012: 
1013:     const rehydrated = await tryRehydrateWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
1014:     if (!rehydrated) {
1015:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1016:         workspaceId,
1017:         deploymentId,
1018:         eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_failed',
1019:         payload: {},
1020:       });
1021:       throw new PolicyError('baseline_rehydrate_failed', 'Workspace git baseline is missing and could not be rehydrated');
1022:     }
1023: 
1024:     remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: true });
1025:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1026:       workspaceId,
1027:       deploymentId,
1028:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_succeeded',
1029:       payload: {},
1030:     });
1031:   }
1032: 
1033:   const provenance =
1034:     payload.provenance && typeof payload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.provenance)
1035:       ? (payload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1036:       : {};
1037:   const taskId = typeof provenance.taskId === 'string' ? provenance.taskId : null;
1038:   const operationId = typeof provenance.operationId === 'string' ? provenance.operationId : null;
1039:   if (taskId) {
1040:     const task = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
1041:     if (!task) {
1042:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_task', 'Referenced taskId does not belong to workspace');
1043:     }
1044:   }
1045:   if (operationId) {
1046:     const operation = await getWorkspaceOperation(env.DB, workspaceId, operationId);
1047:     if (!operation) {
1048:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_operation', 'Referenced operationId does not belong to workspace');
1049:     }
1050:   }
1051: 
1052:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1053:     workspaceId,
1054:     deploymentId,
1055:     eventType: 'deployment_started',
1056:     payload: {
1057:       provider: deployment.provider,
1058:       attemptCount: deployment.attemptCount,
1059:       runBuildIfPresent,
1060:       runTestsIfPresent,
1061:       autoFix: autoFixOptions,
1062:       cache: cacheOptions,
1063:     },
1064:   });
1065: 
1066:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1067: 
1068:   let provider;
1069:   let providerChecks;
1070:   try {
1071:     provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(publishOptions.provider, env);
1072:     if (!deployment.providerDeploymentId) {
1073:       providerChecks = await provider.precheck();
1074:       const failedCheck = providerChecks.find((check) => !check.ok);
1075:       if (failedCheck) {
1076:         throw new PolicyError(failedCheck.code, failedCheck.details ?? 'Provider precheck failed');
1077:       }
1078:     }
1079:   } catch (error) {
1080:     const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
1081:     if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1082:       throw new QueueRetryError('Provider create deployment request is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1083:     }
1084:     throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1085:   }
1086: 
1087:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1088:     workspaceId,
1089:     deploymentId,
1090:     eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck',
1091:     payload: {
1092:       provider: publishOptions.provider,
1093:       checks: providerChecks ?? [],
1094:       skippedForResume: Boolean(deployment.providerDeploymentId),
1095:     },
1096:   });
1097: 
1098:   let toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile;
1099:   try {
1100:     toolchain = applyRequestedToolchainOverride(
1101:       await detectWorkspaceToolchainProfile(
1102:         sandbox,
1103:         workspaceProjectRoot
1104:       ),
1105:       requestedToolchain
1106:     );
1107:   } catch (error) {
1108:     throw new PolicyError('toolchain_detect_failed', error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
1109:   }
1110: 
1111:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1112:     workspaceId,
1113:     deploymentId,
1114:     eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_detected',
1115:     payload: toolchain,
1116:   });
1117: 
1118:   if (toolchain.manager === 'unknown') {
1119:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1120:       workspaceId,
1121:       deploymentId,
1122:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_unknown_fallback',
1123:       payload: { fallbackManager: 'npm' },
1124:     });
1125:   }
1126: 
1127:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
1128:     workspaceId,
1129:     toolchain,
1130:     remediations,
1131:   });
1132: 
1133:   const scripts = await detectPackageScriptsInProjectRoot(sandbox, workspaceProjectRoot);
1134:   const shouldBootstrapForValidation =
1135:     (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest) || (runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild);
1136: 
1137:   if (autoFixOptions.bootstrapToolchain && shouldBootstrapForValidation) {
1138:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1139:       workspaceId,
1140:       deploymentId,
1141:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_started',
1142:       payload: {
1143:         manager: toolchain.manager,
1144:         version: toolchain.version,
1145:       },
1146:     });
1147:     try {
1148:       await bootstrapToolchainIfNeeded(sandbox, toolchain);
1149:       if (toolchain.manager === 'pnpm' || toolchain.manager === 'yarn') {
1150:         remediations.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped', applied: true });
1151:       }
1152:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1153:         workspaceId,
1154:         deploymentId,
1155:         eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_succeeded',
1156:         payload: { manager: toolchain.manager },
1157:       });
1158:     } catch (error) {
1159:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {

<content>1: #!/usr/bin/env node
2: 
3: import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
4: 
5: function requiredEnv(name) {
6:   const value = process.env[name];
7:   if (!value || !value.trim()) {
8:     throw new Error(`Missing required env: ${name}`);
9:   }
10:   return value.trim();
11: }
12: 
13: function optionalInt(name, fallback, min) {
14:   const value = process.env[name];
15:   if (!value) {
16:     return fallback;
17:   }
18:   const parsed = Number.parseInt(value, 10);
19:   if (!Number.isFinite(parsed) || parsed < min) {
20:     throw new Error(`${name} must be an integer >= ${min}`);
21:   }
22:   return parsed;
23: }
24: 
25: async function requestJson(url, init) {
26:   const response = await fetch(url, {
27:     ...init,
28:     headers: {
29:       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
30:       ...(init?.headers ?? {}),
31:     },
32:   });
33:   const text = await response.text();
34:   let body = null;
35:   try {
36:     body = text ? JSON.parse(text) : null;
37:   } catch {
38:     body = { raw: text };
39:   }
40:   return { response, body };
41: }
42: 
43: function assert(condition, message) {
44:   if (!condition) {
45:     throw new Error(message);
46:   }
47: }
48: 
49: function hasFailedCheck(preflight) {
50:   if (!preflight || !Array.isArray(preflight.checks)) {
51:     return false;
52:   }
53:   return preflight.checks.some((check) => check && check.ok === false);
54: }
55: 
56: async function main() {
57:   const workerUrl = requiredEnv('NIMBUS_WORKER_URL').replace(/\/+$/, '');
58:   const workspaceId = requiredEnv('NIMBUS_WORKSPACE_ID');
59:   const outputDir = process.env.NIMBUS_OUTPUT_DIR?.trim() || 'dist';
60:   const expectedTerminalStatus = process.env.NIMBUS_EXPECT_TERMINAL_STATUS?.trim() || 'succeeded';
61:   const pollIntervalMs = optionalInt('NIMBUS_POLL_INTERVAL_MS', 1500, 100);
62:   const maxPolls = optionalInt('NIMBUS_MAX_POLLS', 80, 1);
63:   const idempotencyKey = `contract-${Date.now()}-${randomUUID().slice(0, 8)}`;
64: 
65:   const base = `${workerUrl}/api/workspaces/${workspaceId}`;
66: 
67:   console.log('1) Checking deploy readiness');
68:   {
69:     const { response, body } = await requestJson(`${workerUrl}/api/system/deploy-readiness`, { method: 'GET' });
70:     assert(response.status === 200, `deploy-readiness expected 200, got ${response.status}`);
71:     assert(body && Array.isArray(body.checks), 'deploy-readiness body missing checks array');
72:   }
73: 
74:   console.log('2) Verifying missing outputDir preflight failure contract');
75:   {
76:     const { response, body } = await requestJson(`${base}/deploy/preflight`, {
77:       method: 'POST',
78:       body: JSON.stringify({ provider: 'cloudflare_workers_assets' }),
79:     });
80:     assert(response.status === 200, `preflight(no outputDir) expected 200, got ${response.status}`);
81:     assert(body?.preflight?.ok === false, 'preflight(no outputDir) expected preflight.ok=false');
82:     const hasInvalidOutputDir = Array.isArray(body?.preflight?.checks)
83:       ? body.preflight.checks.some((check) => check?.code === 'provider_invalid_output_dir' && check?.ok === false)
84:       : false;
85:     assert(hasInvalidOutputDir, 'preflight(no outputDir) missing provider_invalid_output_dir failed check');
86:   }
87: 
88:   console.log('3) Running provider preflight with outputDir');
89:   {
90:     const { response, body } = await requestJson(`${base}/deploy/preflight`, {
91:       method: 'POST',
92:       body: JSON.stringify({
93:         provider: 'cloudflare_workers_assets',
94:         validation: { runBuildIfPresent: false, runTestsIfPresent: false },
95:         deploy: { outputDir },
96:       }),
97:     });
98:     assert(response.status === 200, `preflight expected 200, got ${response.status}`);
99:     assert(body?.preflight, 'preflight response missing preflight object');
100:     assert(Array.isArray(body?.preflight?.checks), 'preflight response missing checks array');
101:     assert(!hasFailedCheck(body.preflight), 'preflight has failed checks for configured real provider');
102:   }
103: 
104:   console.log('4) Creating deployment');
105:   let deploymentId = null;
106:   {
107:     const { response, body } = await requestJson(`${base}/deploy`, {
108:       method: 'POST',
109:       headers: { 'Idempotency-Key': idempotencyKey },
110:       body: JSON.stringify({
111:         provider: 'cloudflare_workers_assets',
112:         validation: { runBuildIfPresent: false, runTestsIfPresent: false },
113:         retry: { maxRetries: 2 },
114:         deploy: { outputDir },
115:       }),
116:     });
117:     assert(response.status === 202 || response.status === 200, `create deploy expected 202/200, got ${response.status}`);
118:     deploymentId = body?.deployment?.id ?? null;
119:     assert(typeof deploymentId === 'string' && deploymentId.length > 0, 'create deploy missing deployment.id');
120:   }
121: 
122:   console.log('5) Verifying idempotent replay returns same deployment');
123:   {
124:     const { response, body } = await requestJson(`${base}/deploy`, {
125:       method: 'POST',
126:       headers: { 'Idempotency-Key': idempotencyKey },
127:       body: JSON.stringify({
128:         provider: 'cloudflare_workers_assets',
129:         validation: { runBuildIfPresent: false, runTestsIfPresent: false },
130:         retry: { maxRetries: 2 },
131:         deploy: { outputDir },
132:       }),
133:     });
134:     assert(response.status === 200, `replay create expected 200, got ${response.status}`);
135:     assert(body?.deployment?.id === deploymentId, 'replay create returned different deployment.id');
136:   }
137: 
138:   console.log('6) Polling deployment to terminal status');
139:   let terminalDeployment = null;
140:   {
141:     let terminal = null;
142:     for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxPolls; attempt += 1) {
143:       const { response, body } = await requestJson(`${base}/deployments/${deploymentId}`, { method: 'GET' });
144:       assert(response.status === 200, `poll expected 200, got ${response.status}`);
145:       const status = body?.deployment?.status;
146:       assert(typeof status === 'string', 'poll response missing deployment.status');
147:       if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
148:         terminal = status;
149:         terminalDeployment = body?.deployment ?? null;
150:         break;
151:       }
152:       await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, pollIntervalMs));
153:     }
154:     assert(terminal !== null, `poll did not reach terminal status within ${maxPolls} attempts`);
155:     assert(
156:       terminal === expectedTerminalStatus,
157:       `terminal status mismatch: expected ${expectedTerminalStatus}, got ${terminal}`
158:     );
159:   }
160: 
161:   if (expectedTerminalStatus === 'succeeded') {
162:     console.log('7) Verifying deployedUrl reachability for succeeded deployment');
163:     const deployedUrl = terminalDeployment?.deployedUrl;
164:     assert(typeof deployedUrl === 'string' && deployedUrl.length > 0, 'succeeded deployment missing deployedUrl');
165:     const probe = await fetch(deployedUrl, { method: 'GET', redirect: 'manual' });
166:     assert(
167:       probe.status >= 200 && probe.status < 400,
168:       `deployedUrl probe expected 2xx/3xx, got ${probe.status} for ${deployedUrl}`
169:     );
170:   }
171: 
172:   console.log('Cloudflare contract checks passed.');
173: }
174: 
175: main().catch((error) => {
176:   console.error(`Contract test failed: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`);
177:   process.exit(1);
178: });

1531:         throw new QueueRetryError('Provider create deployment request is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1532:       }
1533:       throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1534:     }
1535:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
1536:       workspaceId,
1537:       providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1538:     });
1539:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1540:       workspaceId,
1541:       deploymentId,
1542:       eventType: 'deployment_provider_created',
1543:       payload: {
1544:         provider: publishOptions.provider,
1545:         providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1546:         status: createResult.status,
1547:         deployedUrl: createResult.deployedUrl,
1548:         outputDir: providerOutputDir,
1549:       },
1550:     });
1551:   }
1552: 
1553:   let providerStatus: WorkspaceDeployStatusResult = {
1554:     status: createResult.status,
1555:     deployedUrl: createResult.deployedUrl,
1556:   };
1557:   let cancelAttempted = false;
1558:   let cancelAccepted = false;
1559:   const maxPollAttempts = parseIntegerString(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER_MAX_POLLS, 120, 1, 600);
1560:   const pollIntervalMs = parseIntegerString(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER_POLL_INTERVAL_MS, 1500, 50, 10000);
1561:   for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxPollAttempts; attempt += 1) {
1562:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId).catch(async (error) => {
1563:         if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {
1564:           if (!cancelAttempted) {
1565:             cancelAttempted = true;
1566:             let cancel;
1567:             try {
1568:               cancel = await provider.cancelDeployment(createResult.providerDeploymentId);
1569:             } catch (providerCancelError) {
1570:               const providerError = normalizeProviderError(providerCancelError);
1571:               if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1572:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Provider cancel status is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1573:               }
1574:               throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1575:             }
1576:             cancelAccepted = cancel.accepted;
1577:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1578:               workspaceId,
1579:             deploymentId,
1580:             eventType: 'deployment_provider_cancel_requested',
1581:             payload: {
1582:               providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1583:               accepted: cancel.accepted,
1584:               },
1585:             });
1586:             if (!cancel.accepted) {
1587:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1588:                 workspaceId,
1589:                 deploymentId,
1590:                 eventType: 'deployment_cancel_rejected',
1591:                 payload: {
1592:                   providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1593:                   duringPolling: true,
1594:                 },
1595:               });
1596:             }
1597:           }
1598:           if (cancelAccepted) {
1599:             return;
1600:           }
1601:         return;
1602:       }
1603:       throw error;
1604:     });
1605: 
1606:     if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded' || providerStatus.status === 'failed' || providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1607:       break;
1608:     }
1609: 
1610:     await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, pollIntervalMs));
1611:     try {
1612:       providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(createResult.providerDeploymentId);
1613:     } catch (error) {
1614:       const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
1615:       if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1616:         throw new QueueRetryError('Provider status endpoint is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1617:       }
1618:       throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1619:     }
1620:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1621:       workspaceId,
1622:       deploymentId,
1623:       eventType: 'deployment_provider_status',
1624:       payload: {
1625:         providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1626:         status: providerStatus.status,
1627:         deployedUrl: providerStatus.deployedUrl,
1628:       },
1629:     });
1630:   }
1631: 
1632:   if (providerStatus.status === 'queued' || providerStatus.status === 'running') {
1633:     if (cancelAccepted) {
1634:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1635:     }
1636:     if (providerStatus.errorCode === 'provider_probe_unknown') {
1637:       throw new QueueRetryError('Provider preview probe is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1638:     }
1639:     throw new PolicyError(
1640:       'provider_deploy_failed',
1641:       `Provider deployment did not reach terminal state within polling window (${maxPollAttempts} attempts)`
1642:     );
1643:   }
1644: 
1645:   if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1646:     throw new PolicyError(providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed', providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed');
1647:   }
1648: 
1649:   if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1650:     await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1651:     return;
1652:   }
1653: 
1654:   const resolvedDeployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? createResult.deployedUrl;
1655:   const allowLegacyNullDeployedUrl = isLegacyCloudflareProviderDeploymentId(createResult.providerDeploymentId);
1656:   if (!resolvedDeployedUrl && !allowLegacyNullDeployedUrl) {
1657:     throw new PolicyError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Provider deployment did not return a deployed URL');
1658:   }
1659: 
1660:   const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1661:   const successResult = {
1662:     ...successResultTemplate,
1663:     url: resolvedDeployedUrl,
1664:   };
1665: 
1666:   let markedSucceeded = await markWorkspaceDeploymentSucceededIfNotCancelled(env.DB, {
1667:     workspaceId,
1668:     deploymentId,
1669:     sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1670:     sourceBundleKey,
1671:     deployedUrl: resolvedDeployedUrl,
1672:     providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1673:     result: successResult,
1674:     finishedAt,
1675:   });
1676: 
1677:   if (!markedSucceeded) {
1678:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1679:     if (latest?.status === 'running' && latest.cancelRequestedAt && providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1680:       const succeededUpdate = await env.DB
1681:         .prepare(
1682:           `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1683:            SET status = 'succeeded',
1684:                source_snapshot_sha256 = ?,
1685:                source_bundle_key = ?,
1686:                deployed_url = ?,
1687:                provider_deployment_id = ?,
1688:                cancel_requested_at = NULL,
1689:                    result_json = ?,
1690:                    error_code = NULL,
1691:                    error_message = NULL,
1692:                    finished_at = ?,
1693:                    duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
1694:                    updated_at = ?
1695:            WHERE id = ?
1696:              AND workspace_id = ?
1697:              AND status = 'running'
1698:              AND cancel_requested_at IS NOT NULL`
1699:         )
1700:         .bind(
1701:           sourceBundle.sha256,
1702:           sourceBundleKey,
1703:           resolvedDeployedUrl,
1704:           createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1705:           JSON.stringify(successResult),
1706:           finishedAt,
1707:           finishedAt,
1708:           finishedAt,
1709:           deploymentId,
1710:           workspaceId
1711:         )
1712:         .run();
1713: 
1714:       if ((succeededUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
1715:         const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1716:         if (concurrent && concurrent.status !== 'running') {
1717:           return;
1718:         }
1719:         throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel-race success reconciliation lost state race; retry requested');
1720:       }
1721:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1722:         workspaceId,
1723:         deploymentId,
1724:         eventType: 'deployment_cancel_rejected',
1725:         payload: {
1726:           providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1727:           providerStatus: providerStatus.status,
1728:         },
1729:       });
1730:       markedSucceeded = true;
1731:     } else if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
1732:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1733:       return;
1734:     } else {
1735:       return;
1736:     }
1737:   }
1738: 
1739:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1740:     workspaceId,
1741:     deploymentId,
1742:     eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
1743:       payload: {
1744:         deployedUrl: resolvedDeployedUrl,
1745:         sourceBundleKey,
1746:         sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1747:       },
1748:     });
1749: 
1750:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1751:     deploymentId,
1752:     status: 'succeeded',
1753:     deployedUrl: resolvedDeployedUrl,
1754:     deployedAt: finishedAt,
1755:     errorCode: null,
1756:     errorMessage: null,
1757:   });
1758: }
