1760: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
1761:   env: Env,
1762:   workspaceId: string,
1763:   options?: Partial<DeploymentValidationOptions & DeploymentAutoFixOptions & DeploymentPublishOptions>
1764: ): Promise<{
1765:   ok: boolean;
1766:   toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
1767:   checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }>;
1768:   remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];
1769: }> {
1770:   const checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }> = [];
1771:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
1772:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
1773:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
1774:     checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: false, details: 'Workspace is not ready' });
1775:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1776:   }
1777:   checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: true });
1778: 
1779:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
1780:   const workspaceProjectRootRaw =
1781:     typeof workspace.sourceProjectRoot === 'string' && workspace.sourceProjectRoot.trim() ? workspace.sourceProjectRoot : '.';
1782:   let workspaceProjectRoot = '.';
1783:   try {
1784:     workspaceProjectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(workspaceProjectRootRaw);
1785:   } catch (error) {
1786:     checks.push({
1787:       code: 'project_root',
1788:       ok: false,
1789:       details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1790:     });
1791:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1792:   }
1793:   const autoFixBaseline = parseBoolean(options?.rehydrateBaseline, false);
1794:   const autoFixBootstrapToolchain = parseBoolean(options?.bootstrapToolchain, false);
1795:   const runBuildIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runBuildIfPresent, true);
1796:   const runTestsIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runTestsIfPresent, true);
1797:   const provider = options?.provider ?? getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(undefined, env);
1798:   const outputDir = parseString(options?.outputDir);
1799: 
1800:   if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
1801:     if (!outputDir) {
1802:       checks.push({
1803:         code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
1804:         ok: false,
1805:         details: 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider',
1806:       });
1807:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1808:     }
1809: 
1810:     const effectiveOutputDir =
1811:       workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? outputDir : normalizeProjectRoot(`${workspaceProjectRoot}/${outputDir}`);
1812:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_output_dir', ok: true, details: effectiveOutputDir });
1813:   }
1814: 
1815:   try {
1816:     await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
1817:     checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: true });
1818:   } catch (error) {
1819:     const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1820:     if (!autoFixBaseline) {
1821:       checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: false, details });
1822:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1823:     }
1824: 
1825:     const rehydrated = await tryRehydrateWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
1826:     if (!rehydrated) {
1827:       checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: false, details });
1828:       remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: false, details: 'auto-fix failed' });
1829:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1830:     }
1831:     remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: true });
1832:     checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: true, details: 'auto-fixed baseline rehydrate' });
1833:   }
1834: 
1835:   const scripts = await detectPackageScriptsInProjectRoot(sandbox, workspaceProjectRoot);
1836:   const shouldBootstrapForValidation =
1837:     autoFixBootstrapToolchain && ((runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) || (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest));
1838:   checks.push({
1839:     code: 'detected_scripts',
1840:     ok: true,
1841:     details: JSON.stringify({ hasBuild: scripts.hasBuild, hasTest: scripts.hasTest }),
1842:   });
1843: 
1844:   const secrets = await detectPotentialSecrets(sandbox);
1845:   if (secrets.length > 0) {
1846:     checks.push({ code: 'secret_scan', ok: false, details: secrets.join(', ') });
1847:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1848:   }
1849:   checks.push({ code: 'secret_scan', ok: true });
1850: 
1851:   let toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile;
1852:   try {
1853:     toolchain = await detectWorkspaceToolchainProfile(
1854:       sandbox,
1855:       workspaceProjectRoot
1856:     );
1857:     checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_detect', ok: true, details: JSON.stringify(toolchain) });
1858:   } catch (error) {
1859:     checks.push({
1860:       code: 'toolchain_detect',
1861:       ok: false,
1862:       details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1863:     });
1864:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1865:   }
1866: 
1867:   if (shouldBootstrapForValidation) {
1868:     try {
1869:       await bootstrapToolchainIfNeeded(sandbox, toolchain);
1870:       checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrap', ok: true });
1871:       remediations.push({
1872:         code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped',
1873:         applied: toolchain.manager === 'pnpm' || toolchain.manager === 'yarn',
1874:       });
1875:     } catch (error) {
1876:       checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrap', ok: false, details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error) });
1877:       remediations.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped', applied: false });
1878:       return { ok: false, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1879:     }
1880:   } else {
1881:     checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrap', ok: true, details: 'skipped' });
1882:   }
1883: 
1884:   if ((runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) || (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest)) {
1885:     const manager = managerBinary(toolchain);
1886:     const managerCheck = await sandbox.exec(`command -v ${manager} >/dev/null 2>&1`);
1887:     if (managerCheck.exitCode !== 0) {
1888:       checks.push({
1889:         code: 'validation_tooling',
1890:         ok: false,
1891:         details: `${manager} is not available in sandbox runtime`,
1892:       });
1893:       return { ok: false, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1894:     }
1895:   }
1896:   checks.push({ code: 'validation_tooling', ok: true });
1897: 
1898:   return { ok: true, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1899: }

1901: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
1902:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1903:   if (!claimed) {
1904:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1905:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
1906:       try {
1907:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1908:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1909:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1910:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1911:         }
1912:       }
1913:       return;
1914:     }
1915: 
1916:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1917:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1918:       return;
1919:     }
1920: 
1921:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1922:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
1923:         const staleFailedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1924:         const staleErrorCode = existing.cancelRequestedAt
1925:           ? 'deployment_stale_timeout_cancel_pending'
1926:           : 'deployment_stale_timeout';
1927:         const staleErrorMessage = existing.cancelRequestedAt
1928:           ? 'Deployment execution exceeded stale timeout while cancellation was pending'
1929:           : 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery';
1930:         const staleFailedUpdate = await env.DB
1931:           .prepare(
1932:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1933:              SET status = 'failed',
1934:                  error_code = ?,
1935:                  error_message = ?,
1936:                  finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
1937:                  duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
1938:                  updated_at = ?
1939:              WHERE id = ?
1940:                AND workspace_id = ?
1941:                AND status = 'running'`
1942:           )
1943:           .bind(staleErrorCode, staleErrorMessage, staleFailedAt, staleFailedAt, staleFailedAt, deploymentId, workspaceId)
1944:           .run();
1945: 
1946:         if ((staleFailedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
1947:           throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment stale-timeout reconciliation lost state race; retry requested');
1948:         }
1949:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1950:           workspaceId,
1951:           deploymentId,
1952:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1953:           payload: {
1954:             code: staleErrorCode,
1955:             message: staleErrorMessage,
1956:           },
1957:         });
1958:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1959:           deploymentId,
1960:           status: 'failed',
1961:           errorCode: staleErrorCode,
1962:           errorMessage: staleErrorMessage,
1963:         });
1964:         return;
1965:       }
1966: 
1967:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1968:         if (!existing.providerDeploymentId) {
1969:           const hasProviderCreatedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
1970:             env.DB,
1971:             workspaceId,
1972:             deploymentId,
1973:             'deployment_provider_created'
1974:           );
1975:           if (!hasProviderCreatedEvent) {
1976:             await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_provider_unknown');
1977:             return;
1978:           }
1979:         }
1980: 
1981:         if (existing.providerDeploymentId) {
1982:           try {
1983:             const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1984:             const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1985:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1986:             const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(existing.providerDeploymentId);
1987: 
1988:             if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1989:               await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1990:               return;
1991:             }
1992: 
1993:             if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1994:               if (!existing.sourceSnapshotSha256 || !existing.sourceBundleKey) {
1995:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment success metadata not yet available; retry requested');
1996:               }
1997:               const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? existing.deployedUrl ?? null;
1998:               const allowLegacyNullDeployedUrl = isLegacyCloudflareProviderDeploymentId(existing.providerDeploymentId);
1999:               if (!deployedUrl && !allowLegacyNullDeployedUrl) {
2000:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Provider deployment succeeded but no deployed URL is available yet; retry requested');
2001:               }
2002:               const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
2003:               const existingResult =
2004:                 existing.result && typeof existing.result === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existing.result)
2005:                   ? (existing.result as Record<string, unknown>)
2006:                   : {};
2007:               const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
2008:               const requestProvenance =
2009:                 requestPayload?.provenance && typeof requestPayload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(requestPayload.provenance)
2010:                   ? (requestPayload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
2011:                   : {};
2012:               const existingArtifact =
2013:                 existingResult.artifact && typeof existingResult.artifact === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existingResult.artifact)
2014:                   ? (existingResult.artifact as Record<string, unknown>)
2015:                   : {};
2016:               const existingProvenance =
2017:                 existingResult.provenance && typeof existingResult.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existingResult.provenance)
2018:                   ? (existingResult.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
2019:                   : {};
2020:               const successResult = {
2021:                 ...existingResult,
2022:                 url: deployedUrl,
2023:                 artifact: {
2024:                   sourceBundleKey: existing.sourceBundleKey,
2025:                   sourceSnapshotSha256: existing.sourceSnapshotSha256,
2026:                   outputBundleSha256:
2027:                     typeof existingArtifact.outputBundleSha256 === 'string' ? existingArtifact.outputBundleSha256 : null,
2028:                   outputDir: typeof existingArtifact.outputDir === 'string' ? existingArtifact.outputDir : null,
2029:                 },
2030:                 provenance: {
2031:                   ...existingProvenance,
2032:                   workspaceId,
2033:                   taskId:
2034:                     typeof requestProvenance.taskId === 'string'
2035:                       ? requestProvenance.taskId
2036:                       : (existingProvenance.taskId ?? null),
2037:                   operationId:
2038:                     typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
2039:                       ? requestProvenance.operationId
2040:                       : (existingProvenance.operationId ?? null),
2041:                   trigger:
2042:                     typeof requestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
2043:                       ? requestProvenance.trigger
2044:                       : typeof existingProvenance.trigger === 'string'
2045:                         ? existingProvenance.trigger
2046:                         : 'manual',
2047:                 },
2048:                 rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(requestPayload?.rollbackOnFailure, true),
2049:                 reconciled: true,
2050:                 fromCancelRequested: true,
2051:               };
2052:               const succeededUpdate = await env.DB
2053:                 .prepare(
2054:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2055:                    SET status = 'succeeded',
2056:                        deployed_url = ?,
2057:                        provider_deployment_id = ?,
2058:                        source_snapshot_sha256 = ?,
2059:                        source_bundle_key = ?,
2060:                        cancel_requested_at = NULL,
2061:                         result_json = ?,
2062:                         error_code = NULL,
2063:                         error_message = NULL,
2064:                         finished_at = ?,
2065:                         duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
2066:                         updated_at = ?
2067:                    WHERE id = ?
2068:                      AND workspace_id = ?
2069:                      AND status = 'running'
2070:                      AND cancel_requested_at IS NOT NULL`
2071:                 )
2072:                 .bind(
2073:                   deployedUrl,
2074:                   existing.providerDeploymentId,
2075:                   existing.sourceSnapshotSha256,
2076:                   existing.sourceBundleKey,
2077:                   JSON.stringify(successResult),
2078:                   finishedAt,
2079:                   finishedAt,
2080:                   finishedAt,
2081:                   deploymentId,
2082:                   workspaceId
2083:                 )
2084:                 .run();
2085: 
2086:               if ((succeededUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {

2842:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
2843:         return;
2844:       }
2845: 
2846:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
2847:         retryableErrorRaised = true;
2848:         try {
2849:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
2850:           if (recovered) {
2851:             continue;
2852:           }
2853:         } catch {
2854:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
2855:         }
2856:       }
2857:     }
2858: 
2859:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2860:     if (!latest) {
2861:       return;
2862:     }
2863:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
2864:       return;
2865:     }
2866:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {
2867:       continue;
2868:     }
2869:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
2870:       return;
2871:     }
2872:   }
2873: }
2874: 
2875: export async function cancelWorkspaceDeployment(
2876:   env: Env,
2877:   workspaceId: string,
2878:   deploymentId: string
2879: ): Promise<{ updated: boolean; deployment: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getWorkspaceDeployment>> }> {
2880:   const result = await requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2881:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'cancelled') {
2882:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2883:       workspaceId,
2884:       deploymentId,
2885:       eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
2886:       payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
2887:     });
2888:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
2889:       deploymentId,
2890:       status: 'cancelled',
2891:       errorCode: null,
2892:       errorMessage: null,
2893:     });
2894:   }
2895:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'running') {
2896:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2897:       workspaceId,
2898:       deploymentId,
2899:       eventType: 'deployment_cancel_requested',
2900:       payload: { cancelRequestedAt: result.deployment.cancelRequestedAt },
2901:     });
2902:   }
2903:   return result;
2904: }
2905: 
2906: export function shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error: unknown): boolean {
2907:   if (error instanceof QueueRetryError) {
2908:     return true;
2909:   }
2910:   if (isTransientFailure(error)) {
2911:     return true;
2912:   }
2913: 
2914:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
2915:   return /(d1|database is locked|sqlite_busy|temporarily unavailable|connection reset)/i.test(message);
2916: }

parts.text:
**Findings**
- **Medium – per-file sandbox round trips can make deploys time out on large output dirs** (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:609`, `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:633`)  
  The new `createOutputFiles` flow runs one sandbox command to list files, then a separate sandbox command per file to fetch base64 bytes. In real static builds (hundreds/thousands of files), this creates hundreds/thousands of sandbox execs and Python startups, which can significantly increase deploy time and realistically exceed worker/sandbox time budgets.  
  **When it happens:** large frontend outputs (e.g. hashed asset trees, docs sites).  
  **Why it matters:** deploys can fail with timeout/transient errors even though build output is valid.  
  **Suggested fix:** batch byte collection in one command (or a small number of chunks), e.g. emit base64 for all files in the initial collector script, or stream a single archive/manifest payload instead of per-file fetches.

No other clear correctness bugs stood out in the changed code.
